title: Who is Ritsukos Father
wikitext:
[]: Who is Ritsuko's Father? Post by InterGrinch » Sun Sep 13, 2009 5:49 pm Uhh... ????????????????? >.<

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sun Sep 13, 2009 6:00 pm Someone who didn't work at Gehirn?

[]: Post by Synapsid » Sun Sep 13, 2009 6:08 pm Someone with parallels to papa Langley, it doesn't seem like he was there for her at all. Alternately he could have died around 2I, fitting into the dead parent theme, but Rits-chan's already an orphan, and I like the Asuka connection better.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 13, 2009 6:35 pm Like with Asuka, we don't know. Nothing is said about them and we are only given stuff about there mother.

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Sep 13, 2009 9:16 pm Mum's pretty much one of the big core main themes in Eva anyways.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Sun Sep 13, 2009 9:24 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Mum's pretty much one of the big core main themes in Eva anyways.

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Sep 13, 2009 9:26 pm not just scientists synapsid, everyone is sick in Eva!

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Sep 13, 2009 9:29 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: not just scientists synapsid, everyone is sick in Eva!

[]: Post by thewayneiac » Sun Sep 13, 2009 9:30 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Like with Asuka, we don't know. Nothing is said about them and we are only given stuff about there mother.

[]: Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 13, 2009 11:39 pm Midichlorians

[]: Post by Dartz » Mon Sep 14, 2009 4:34 am Damn you Darth Vader you Dark sided stud muffin...

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 14, 2009 6:08 am thewayneiac wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: Like with Asuka, we don't know. Nothing is said about them and we are only given stuff about there mother.

[]: Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Sep 14, 2009 11:19 am Naughtius Maximus?

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 14, 2009 3:40 pm Who Cares? It's not like he ever fucking did anything outside of fathering Ritsuko, she has no Father Issues to develop her character, and since he's not onscreen, learning his identity contributes nothing.

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Sep 14, 2009 4:48 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: not just scientists synapsid, everyone is sick in Eva!

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 14, 2009 5:03 pm @AuraTwilight Exactly. We can rule out all the named characters of suitable age , and then it ceases to be an intersting question.

[]: Post by brainissues » Mon Sep 14, 2009 5:29 pm some centraedi lost in the space , there is something that everyone of us must remember , *anno's brain

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Mon Sep 14, 2009 7:50 pm It's me. I'm Ritsuko's father.

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Sep 14, 2009 8:26 pm Brik, are you a dick with a time machine?

[]: Post by Teague » Mon Sep 14, 2009 8:31 pm or a time machine with a dick?
